# Cord

> Cord is an independent B2B quoting and payments SaaS for any business in Mexico —
> not exclusive to Shopify or to clients of its parent company, Flouvia. Businesses use
> Cord to create quotes with negotiated pricing and credit terms, get them approved via
> a public link, collect payment (cards, SPEI, autonomous AI collections), and issue
> CFDI 4.0 invoices, all without leaving the quote flow.

Cord is built and maintained by the team at Flouvia (flouvia.com), a Mexican company —
but Cord itself is a standalone product with its own domain, billing, and signup, open
to any B2B business in Mexico regardless of whether they use any other Flouvia product.

## Core capabilities

- Quote editor with negotiated pricing, volume pricing tiers, and credit terms (Contado / Net 30 / Net 60)
- Public quote links with e-signature, line-item negotiation chat, and partial approval
- Direct payments via Stripe Connect (cards + SPEI), split into deposit/balance/installments
- Autonomous AI collections agent (opt-in) that negotiates payment plans over email
- CFDI 4.0 electronic invoicing for Mexico via Facturapi
- Multi-currency quoting (MXN/USD/EUR) with FX rate locking
- Team roles, approval thresholds, and audit logging for B2B sales orgs

## Documentation

- [API reference](https://cordhq.app/desarrolladores/api): REST API for quotes, clients, products, collections
- [OpenAPI spec](https://cordhq.app/openapi.yaml): machine-readable schema for the full API
- [Integrations & webhooks](https://cordhq.app/desarrolladores/integraciones): outbound event notifications (quote.sent, quote.paid, etc.), HMAC-signed, plus Zapier/Make/n8n guidance
- [MCP server](https://cordhq.app/desarrolladores/mcp): Model Context Protocol tools for AI agents to query quotes, clients, and receivables
- [Cord Elements](https://cordhq.app/elements): embeddable quote builder (Web Component, React, Vue) — npm package `@flouviahq/elements`

## Product

- [Pricing](https://cordhq.app/precios): 5 plans (Free through Developer), MXN
- [Product overview](https://cordhq.app/producto/editor): the quote editor and full feature set
- [Solutions by industry](https://cordhq.app/soluciones/empresas): enterprise and startup use cases

## Support

- [Help center](https://cordhq.app/soporte): setup guides, billing, fiscal (CFDI), API troubleshooting
- [Roadmap](https://cordhq.app/roadmap): shipped, in-progress, and planned features
